series_metadata.series_title: Recordings of Hearings before Hearing Officers
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of recordings, including but not limited to, cassette tapes, CD''s or audio recordings, of a hearing before a hearing officer.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Recordings are to retained on-site for five years from the date the disciplinary case file is closed - date of the Division''s final notice, the Board or the Commission''s Order, or the expiration of appeals, whichever is longer. Then the recordings, if in cassette tape or CD may be recycled and if in machine readable format, may be deleted., Electronic: Other
